description: Derive the best anomalygen inference step from a checkpoint tree: argmax avg nn_score among validated steps that have a saved iter_*.pt, falling back to the latest trained iter, then to the supplied fallback step.
rules: read-only: walks the checkpoint filesystem, writes only best_step.txt under record_store
iter 0 (pre-training baseline) is never selected; validated steps without a matching saved iter_*.pt are skipped
case 1 (valid_kpi.csv tree) → peak avg nn_score; case 2 (trainer output, no validation) → latest trained iter; case 3 (shipped flat checkpoint) → fallback step
usage: Set CKPT_ROOT (the checkpoint root to scan) and optional FALLBACK_STEP (default 0). pick_best_step writes the chosen step to best_step.txt under record_store; the selection rationale is in best_step.txt.log.
limitation: Selection quality depends on the checkpoint layout the OSMO anomalygen trainer produced (valid_kpi.csv tree + checkpoints/model/iter_*.pt). The latest-trained fallback (case 2) carries no per-step KPIs. The training that produces these checkpoints runs remotely on OSMO; this perk only inspects an already-materialised tree.
